IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (30163002.pdf)
SUMMARY: Young, dedicated and focused office administrative assistant who excels at prioritizing, completing multiple tasks simultaneously and following through to achieve project goals. Seeking a role of increased responsibility and authority.
SKILLS: business development, central point of contact, closing, client, clients, email, employee relations, fast, faxes, meetings, access, mail, office, PowerPoint presentations, neat, payroll, personnel, quality, receptionist, sales, spreadsheets, telephone, employee handbooks

JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
